result.stderr:
Usage:
  SphereIntegrationHub.cli --workflow <path> --env <environment> [--catalog <path>] [--envfile <path>] [--varsfile <path>] [--refresh-cache] [--dry-run] [--verbose] [--debug] [--mocked]

Options:
  -w, --workflow  Workflow file to execute.
  -e, --env       Environment key to resolve base url.
  -c, --catalog   Optional catalog path (defaults to embedded catalog).
      --envfile   Optional env file override for the root workflow.
      --varsfile  Optional vars file override (must be .wfvars).
      --refresh-cache  Redownload swagger definitions even if cached.
      --dry-run   Print the execution plan without calling endpoints.
      --verbose   Print detailed plan information.
      --debug     Print stage debug sections before invocation.
      --mocked    Use mock payloads/outputs when defined.
  -h, --help      Show this help.

PinedaTec.eu © 2026

commands.payload:
Usage:
  SphereIntegrationHub.cli --workflow <path> --env <environment> [--catalog <path>] [--envfile <path>] [--varsfile <path>] [--refresh-cache] [--dry-run] [--verbose] [--debug] [--mocked]

Options:
  -w, --workflow  Workflow file to execute.
  -e, --env       Environment key to resolve base url.
  -c, --catalog   Optional catalog path (defaults to embedded catalog).
      --envfile   Optional env file override for the root workflow.
      --varsfile  Optional vars file override (must be .wfvars).
      --refresh-cache  Redownload swagger definitions even if cached.
      --dry-run   Print the execution plan without calling endpoints.
      --verbose   Print detailed plan information.
      --debug     Print stage debug sections before invocation.
      --mocked    Use mock payloads/outputs when defined.
  -h, --help      Show this help.
